title: Create VIDEO Node
user_story:
As an API contributor\
I want to be able to create VIDEO nodes\
So I can later use them to illustrate other nodes
description:
* A VIDEO node is successfully created when the request contains valid data. The required data structure is specified in parent (epic) ticket MCA-73. -> Status Code \`201\`
* A successful request returns the created node with all specified properties.
* Properties are returned, even when they are empty (optional fields). They are returned with value \`null\`.
* Unknown properties are ignored. They are not processed. They do not produce any info, warning or error messages for the user. -> Status Code \`201\`
* Read-only properties (like \`id\`, \`created\_at\`, \`updated\_at\`) are ignored. They are not processed. They do not produce any info, warning or error messages for the user. -> Status Code \`201\`
* Requests with invalid data are rejected. Cases for invalid data include: missing mandatory fields, syntax errors, wrong data types or wrong data structure. -> Status Code \`400\`
* As long as <https://dennis-gerike.atlassian.net/browse/MCA-4238> is not implemented the system will create dummy data for the read-only fields.
